image.alt: Serene forest landscape representing natural wellness and recovery philosophy at Vital Ice San Francisco
image.imageTag:
<Image
          src="https://media.vitalicesf.com/vision-forest.jpg"
          alt="Serene forest landscape representing natural wellness and recovery philosophy at Vital Ice San Francisco"
          fill
          className={styles.about__backgroundImage}
          loading="lazy"
          sizes="100vw"
        />

image.alt: Black volcanic sand texture background for wellness center ambiance at Vital Ice San Francisco
image.imageTag:
<Image
          src="https://media.vitalicesf.com/texture_blacksand.jpg"
          alt="Black volcanic sand texture background for wellness center ambiance at Vital Ice San Francisco"
          fill
          className={styles.benefits__backgroundImage}
          loading="lazy"
          sizes="100vw"
        />

recommendations: Consider using empty alt="" or aria-hidden="true" for decorative images

image.alt: Black volcanic sand texture background for wellness testimonials at Vital Ice San Francisco
image.imageTag:
<Image
          src="https://media.vitalicesf.com/texture_blacksand.jpg"
          alt="Black volcanic sand texture background for wellness testimonials at Vital Ice San Francisco"
          fill
          className={styles.testimonials__backgroundImage}
          loading="lazy"
          sizes="100vw"
        />

recommendations: Consider using empty alt="" or aria-hidden="true" for decorative images

image.alt: Vital Ice logo - Premier wellness and recovery center in San Francisco Marina District
image.imageTag:
<Image
        src="https://media.vitalicesf.com/logo-dark.png"
        alt="Vital Ice logo - Premier wellness and recovery center in San Francisco Marina District"
        width={width || 300}
        height={height || 150}
        style={{ objectFit: 'contain', width: '100%', height: 'auto' }}
        priority={priority}
      />

shouldContain: descriptive content about the image purpose

functionalImages.context: must describe what happens when activated
